title: Chinese Street Food Maker
description: Happy Chinese Lunar New Year to All Chinese Friends!! Do you like to eat Chinese food! Well then download this game and start cooking. Here you may learn how to make the most popular Chinese foods such as 1. Chinese Bhel, 2.Spring Roll, 3.Noodles, 4.Fried Rice, 5.Chinese Salad, 6.Fortune Cookies, 7.Hot & Sour Shoup, etc. Features: -Improve your cooking skill as well as food design skills -Make yummy Chinese foods. -Fun educational game for a little chef. -Enjoy different Chinese items from the Chinese Street Food Maker Game. Interactive gameplay will help you make beautiful meals in your kitchen or your shop and prepare orders for your clients. The yummy Chinese Food is waiting for you: ★Dim Sum ★Hot & Sour Shoup ★Fried Noodles ★Sweet Dumplings ★Szechwan Chilli Chicken ★Noodles ★Fortune Cookies ★Chinese Salad ★Tofu Fried Rice ★Spring Rolls ★Sizzlers ★Chow mein ★Soup ★Manchurian Chinese Street Maker game is very easy to play for all age people. It is Free to Play for All. -More Than 8 Language - English, Chinese Simplified, Italian, French, Japanese, German, Russian, Hindi, etc. And everybody will enjoy it! Try it yourself and tell us what you think of Chinese Street Food Maker Games!
